title: duhaldea nervosa
intro: Duhaldea nervosa, also known as bitter yam or bitter potato, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae, native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antihelmintic properties. The health benefits of Duhaldea nervosa include the treatment of various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to extract its medicinal compounds.
